summary: Iteration 90: Tested PA Edit Details feature + Forward to Admin bug fix. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 skipped - no proposal_paid PA). Frontend: All features working - Edit modal opens, saves changes, shows locked warning for case_created. No JavaScript errors during any interactions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 90 verified: (1) BUG FIX - Forward to Admin button no longer throws 'pas is not defined' error - the fix renamed pas/setPas to assessments/setAssessments in 9 places in PreAssessmentPipeline.jsx. (2) NEW Edit PA Details - PUT /api/pre-assessment/{pa_id}/details endpoint works correctly with authorization (admin any, partner own, client 403), locked state for case_created (400), no-change detection, and user sync to users collection. (3) Edit PA Modal - Opens with 9 fields (name, email, mobile, age, education, work_experience, country, service_type, notes), shows amber locked warning for case_created stage, Save button works and shows toast. (4) WhatsApp button present in PaActionBar. (5) Send Proposal and Submit Final flows work without errors (regression test for setPas fix).

BUG_FIX_Forward_to_Admin.description: Forward to Admin button was throwing 'pas is not defined' ReferenceError
BUG_FIX_Forward_to_Admin.fix_applied: Renamed pas/setPas to assessments/setAssessments in 9 places
BUG_FIX_Forward_to_Admin.test_result: PASS - No JavaScript errors when interacting with PA cards

NEW_Edit_PA_Modal_Frontend.Locked warning banner for case_created: PASS - Shows 'This case is active — details are locked'
